Rural_sediment.description: Suspended sediment loads (mg per litre) measured in rural river sections. This and Urban_sediment are measurements of the same outcome variable (suspended sediment) from two independent groups.

Urban_sediment.description: Suspended sediment loads (mg per litre) measured in urban river sections. This and Rural_sediment are measurements of the same outcome variable (suspended sediment) from two independent groups.

Location_type.description: Grouping variable indicating whether the river section is in a rural or urban area, used as the independent variable in the two-sample t-test.
